title: oncoba somalensis
intro: Oncoba somalensis, also known as the East African Oncoba, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of East Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiparasitic activities. The health benefits of Oncoba somalensis include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and intestinal parasites, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that are used to treat various health ailments.
